name: Potato-Stuffed Green Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Slice away the tops of the green bell peppers below the stems. Remove seeds and interior spines.
3. Gently parboil the peppers for about 5 minutes. Drain upside down and set aside.
4. Saute onions and red peppers in oil until soft. Add seasonings and mix well into mashed potatoes.
5. Carefully stuff the peppers with the potato mixture. Place them in a deep-sided baking dish. Pour tomato sauce around the base of the peppers.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes covered. Uncover and bake an additional 5 minutes longer.
7. Serve warm.
